description: Fix an off-by-one error in array processing
prompt: Read ArrayUtils.java. The findMax method has an off-by-one error — it starts iterating from index 0 instead of 1, causing it to always compare the first element with itself. Also, the sumRange method uses '<=' for the end index which causes ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when end equals the array length. Fix both bugs. Write the fixed file.
